spec_match.rationale: Exercises column-rule/row-rule across grid and flex, repeat() rule syntax, and the spec's canonical `rule` shorthand when both axes share the same value.

interactive.rationale: Real controls drive the live preview, collapse readout, border-vs-rule probe, and copyable CSS output.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb promises an interactive builder with live preview and copyable snippet; the page delivers exactly that.

edge_cases.rationale: The builder now surfaces style:none collapse, width-zero collapse, and the border-vs-gap-rule shared-edge comparison.

references.rationale: The `see also` section links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5157805733183488 directly.

design_system.rationale: All colours come from CSS variables, the copy button overrides background + color together, and there is no static-card pattern.

summary: The builder now demonstrates repeat(), the real `rule` shorthand from CSS Gaps 1, collapse behavior, and border-vs-rule shared-edge behavior. Chrome DevTools MCP in Headless Chrome Canary 151 verified shorthand output, style:none collapse, width-zero collapse, compare toggle behavior, clean console, and the feature conformance route at 8 pass / 0 fail.
